subject: california lawmakers eye billing businesses for edison rescue

emails.subject: Re: California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison Rescue
emails.subject_base: California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison Rescue
emails.body: Re: California Lawmakers Eye Billing Businesses for Edison Rescue I didn't talk to Jason on this one. I'll check w/ Mark, but I doubt he would know what we gave to Hertzberg and the chamber. It's odd that Jason said Enron "executive" since if he talks to me or Mark, he uses "spokesman" or uses our names... I think Davis's new hit men are really trying to paint us as the evil empire...
